description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Packages that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and published releases. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-22.04 to build Debian packages for various distributions, including Debian unstable, bullseye, buster, Ubuntu jammy, and focal. For each distribution, checkout the code, determine the Launchpad PPA, generate a Debian changelog, build the package, and upload it to Launchpad.
